# Finalize atomic replication change: r1 is in a joint config with
# VOTER_INCOMING on s3, which should be promoted to VOTER_FULL.

set-store quiet=true
  store-id=1 node-id=1 locality-tiers=zone=a
  store-id=2 node-id=2 locality-tiers=zone=b
  store-id=3 node-id=3 locality-tiers=zone=c
  store-id=4 node-id=4 locality-tiers=zone=d
----

store-leaseholder-msg
store-id=1
  range-id=1
    store-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    store-id=2 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=3 type=VOTER_INCOMING
    config=num_replicas=3
----

repair-needed
----
FinalizeAtomicReplicationChange: r1

repair store-id=1
----
[mmaid=1] applying replica change r1 type: ChangeReplica target store n3,s3 (replica-id=3 type=VOTER_INCOMING)->(replica-id=unknown type=VOTER_FULL) to range 1 on store 3
[mmaid=1] addPendingRangeChange: change_id=1, range_id=1, change=r1 type: ChangeReplica target store n3,s3 (replica-id=3 type=VOTER_INCOMING)->(replica-id=unknown type=VOTER_FULL)
[mmaid=1] result(success): FinalizeAtomicReplicationChange repair for r1
pending(1)
change-id=1 store-id=3 node-id=3 range-id=1 load-delta=[cpu:0s/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=0s gc=5m0s
  prev=(replica-id=3 type=VOTER_INCOMING)
  next=(replica-id=unknown type=VOTER_FULL)

# Pending change suppresses further repair.
repair-needed
----
RepairPending: r1

# Confirm finalization: leaseholder reports all VOTER_FULL.
store-leaseholder-msg
store-id=1
  range-id=1
    store-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    store-id=2 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL
    config=num_replicas=3
----

# After finalization enacted, range is healthy.
repair-needed
----
no ranges need repair
